audit_items.proof_trace: The only safeTransfer of assetOut in bid() (line 89) is exclusively gated by `if (receiver != address(0))` where receiver is a local snapshot of s_receiver taken at line 86. When s_receiver == address(0), this guard evaluates false and the transfer is skipped, leaving all assetOut tokens in the contract. No other code path in bid() transfers assetOut.
